---
title: "Karol Bolbotowski"
---

I am a mathematician interested in **[your area 1]**, **[your area 2]**, and **[your area 3]**.

I am affiliated with the **Warsaw University of Technology**.

## Research interests

My research interests include:

- [Research topic 1]
- [Research topic 2]
- [Research topic 3]
- [Research topic 4]

## News

- **June 2026:** Website launched.
- **[Month Year]:** Add a recent paper, talk, course, or conference item.
- **[Month Year]:** Add another update here.

## Selected publications

1. **Karol Bolbotowski**, *Title of preprint*, arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX, 2026.  
   [arXiv](#) · [PDF](#)

2. **Karol Bolbotowski**, Coauthor, *Title of article*, Journal Name, volume, pages, year.  
   [DOI](#) · [arXiv](#) · [PDF](#)

See the full [publications page](publications.qmd).

## Contact

Email: [karol.bolbotowski@pw.edu.pl](mailto:karol.bolbotowski@pw.edu.pl)

Links:

- [Google Scholar](#)
- [ORCID](#)
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/search/math?searchtype=author&query=Bolbotowski%2C+K)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/kbolbotowski)
